sections.sectionTitle: Hotkhiat ding leh Thukkik ding Ngetna

verses.text: Pasian aw, hong hon in! Bang hang hiam cih leh tuikhang in ka ngawng ciang hong tuum ta hi
Khe tawh din'kipna ding mun a omlohna buannawng thuk sungah ka tumsuk a, tuithuk sung tung khinta-in ka tungah tuikhang a luang hi
Ka kikokona-in ka gim a, ka dang keuta hi. Ka Pasian ka ngakngakna-in ka mitte maang ta hi
Thu omlopi-in kei a hong mudah mi, ka lu tunga samzangte sangin tamzaw uh hi. Kei a hong susia ding, zuauthu tawh a hong dote hat mahmah uh hi. Kei' guk lohpi ke'n loh ding ka hi hiam
Pasian aw, ka pillohna na thei a, ka tatkhialhnate nangma kiang pan kiliahlo hi
Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, nangmah a hong muangte keima hangin zahhuaisak kei in. Israel Pasian aw, nang a hong zongte keima hangin mindaisak kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma hangin kona ka thuak a, maizumna in kei hong pumtuam khinta hi
Ka sanggamte lakah midangpi ka suak a, khualmi ka bang hi
Nangma inn ka deihluatna mei bangin ka sungah sa a, nangmah hong kote' konate keima tung hong tu hi
An ngolhna tawh ka lungsim ka kiniamkhiat a, tua pen keimah hong kikona lehsuak zawsop hi
Ka puan dingin puanhampi bawl taleng zong amaute-a' dingin gentehna ka suak veve hi
Kongzing lakah mite' gengen ka hi a, zukhamte in keima thu la-in hong sa uh hi
Topa aw, ke'n ahih leh nang tungah thu kong ngen hi. A kicing na itna kip tawh a hun hoih ciangin hong dawng in, ka Pasian aw
Buannawng thuk sungah tumsukna ding panin nangma thuman huhna tawh kei hong hon in la, tuithukte leh ka galte' kiang panin kei hong suaktasak in
Keima tungah tuikhang lauhuai hong luangsak kei in la, khuamial thukpi hong nawmvalhsak kei in. Gum in a kuavang keima tungah hong khaknelhsak kei in
Topa aw, na itna kip hoih ahih manin kei hong dawng in la, na hehpihna lian a om tawh kizui-in kei' lam hong nga in
Na nasempa kiang pan na maitang seel kei in la, kei cimawh ka hih ciangin hong dawng meng in
Kei kiangah hong nai in la, kei hong hon in. Ka galte' khutsung pan kei hong khah in
Keimah hong kisimmawhna, ka maizumna leh ka mindaina nang na thei a, ka galte khempeuh zong nang na thei hi
Simmawhna in ka lungsim hong zo a, kei ka cimawh ta hi. Kei a hong hehpih ding mi ka zon'zon' hangin kuamah omlo a, hong huh ding ka zon' hangin kuamah ka mu kei hi
Amaute in an dingin gu hong pia uh a, ka dangtakna-ah dawn dingin tuithuk hong pia uh hi
Amau' mai-a kilui ante thangzak suaksak in la, amau' biakna pawi ante tehlop suaksak in
Khua a muh theihlohna dingun amau' mit mialsak in la, a kawngte uh zawcipsak in
Amaute tungah nangma thangpaihna sungsuk in la, na sinsona amaute bansak in
Amaute' phualpi a kilawi mun suak hen la, amau' bukah mi khat zong tengsak kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in na satgawp mi amaute in bawlsia uh a, nangmah in na liamsaksa mi amaute in gimsak sawnsawn uh hi
Amau' gim thuakna banah thuaksak thuahthuah lai in la, nangma tung panin suahtakna ngah kei ta uh hen
A nungtate' laibu sung panin amaute kiphiatsak in la, miphate lakah a min uh kikhumsak kei in
Ahih hangin keimah in gimna thuakin na ka sa hi. Pasian aw, kei hong kaito-in hong honkhia ta in
Lasakna tawh Pasian' min ka phat ding a, lungdamna tawh amah ka pahtawi ding hi
Hih banga hihna in bawngtal tawh biakna ahi a, bawngtalno tawh biakna sangin zong Topa lungdamsak zaw ding hi
Netniamna a thuakte in hih thu mu-in lungdam uh hen. Pasian a zong note aw, na lungsim uh nosuaksak kik un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a cimawhte' aw za a, henna sungah a om a mite simmawhlo hi
Vantung leh leitung, tuipi leh a sungah a om khempeuhte in amah phat ta uh hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in Zion honin Judah khuapite lamkik ding a, a nasemte tua lai-ah tengin tang pah ding uh hi
Ama nasemte' tate in tua leitang luah ding uh a, amah a itte tua sungah teng ding uh hi.
